title: How much emergency fund should I keep?
question_body: Community question about how much emergency fund should i keep?
answer_body: If your income is irregular or your job is unstable, target the higher end of the range.

title: How much emergency fund should I keep?
question_body: Community question about how much emergency fund should i keep?
answer_body: Three to six months of essential expenses, kept liquid in a high-yield savings account, not in volatile assets.
combined_text: How much emergency fund should I keep? Community question about how much emergency fund should i keep? Three to six months of essential expenses, kept liquid in a high-yield savings account, not in volatile assets. emergency-fund saving budgeting

title: Where should I keep my emergency savings?
question_body: Community question about where should i keep my emergency savings?
answer_body: Split it: one month in checking for instant access, the rest in a high-yield account.
combined_text: Where should I keep my emergency savings? Community question about where should i keep my emergency savings? Split it: one month in checking for instant access, the rest in a high-yield account. saving emergency-fund risk

title: When should I prioritise retirement contributions?
question_body: Community question about when should i prioritise retirement contributions?
answer_body: After high-interest debt and a starter emergency fund, capture the full employer match before anything else.
combined_text: When should I prioritise retirement contributions? Community question about when should i prioritise retirement contributions? After high-interest debt and a starter emergency fund, capture the full employer match before anything else. retirement investing saving

title: How do I avoid investment fraud?
question_body: Community question about how do i avoid investment fraud?
answer_body: Check the seller's registration, be sceptical of guaranteed returns, and never let urgency rush a decision.
combined_text: How do I avoid investment fraud? Community question about how do i avoid investment fraud? Check the seller's registration, be sceptical of guaranteed returns, and never let urgency rush a decision. scam fraud risk

title: Should I refinance my mortgage?
question_body: Community question about should i refinance my mortgage?
answer_body: Watch the term reset: lowering the rate but restarting 30 years can raise total interest paid.
combined_text: Should I refinance my mortgage? Community question about should i refinance my mortgage? Watch the term reset: lowering the rate but restarting 30 years can raise total interest paid. mortgage refinance interest-rate

title: How can I improve my credit score?
question_body: Community question about how can i improve my credit score?
answer_body: Pay on time, keep utilisation low, avoid unnecessary applications and check your reports for errors.
combined_text: How can I improve my credit score? Community question about how can i improve my credit score? Pay on time, keep utilisation low, avoid unnecessary applications and check your reports for errors. credit-score credit-card debt

title: Where should I keep my emergency savings?
question_body: Community question about where should i keep my emergency savings?
answer_body: Safety and liquidity first: high-yield savings or short Treasury bills, not equities you may have to sell at a loss.
combined_text: Where should I keep my emergency savings? Community question about where should i keep my emergency savings? Safety and liquidity first: high-yield savings or short Treasury bills, not equities you may have to sell at a loss. saving emergency-fund risk

title: Should I pay extra on my mortgage or invest?
question_body: Community question about should i pay extra on my mortgage or invest?
answer_body: Paying down a low fixed-rate mortgage is a guaranteed but modest return; investing has higher expected but uncertain returns.
combined_text: Should I pay extra on my mortgage or invest? Community question about should i pay extra on my mortgage or invest? Paying down a low fixed-rate mortgage is a guaranteed but modest return; investing has higher expected but uncertain returns. mortgage investing debt

title: Do I need a financial advisor?
question_body: Community question about do i need a financial advisor?
answer_body: A fee-only fiduciary helps with complex tax, estate or retirement planning; simple investing may only need a low-cost index fund.
